LightningComponentBundle.description: Amount and Frequency Selector for donation forms

property.name: freq1Value
property.label: Frequency 1 — API value
property.description: API value for the first frequency option.

property.name: freq1Label
property.label: Frequency 1 — Display label
property.description: Button label. Leave blank to use the default Custom Label (Give once).

property.name: freq2Value
property.label: Frequency 2 — API value
property.description: API value for the second frequency option.

property.name: freq2Label
property.label: Frequency 2 — Display label
property.description: Button label. Leave blank to use the default Custom Label (Monthly).

property.name: showFrequencyToggle
property.label: Show frequency toggle
property.description: Uncheck to hide the toggle and always submit frequency 1.

property.name: presetAmountsOneTime
property.label: Preset amounts — one-time (comma-separated)
property.description: Up to 6 comma-separated numbers, e.g. 25,50,100,250,500,1000. Leave blank to hide the preset grid.

property.name: presetAmountsRecurring
property.label: Preset amounts — recurring (comma-separated)
property.description: Up to 6 comma-separated numbers for the recurring frequency. Leave blank to hide the preset grid.

property.name: minAmount
property.label: Minimum amount
property.description: Minimum accepted value in the custom amount field.

property.name: maxAmount
property.label: Maximum amount (0 = none)
property.description: Maximum accepted value. Set to 0 for no limit.

property.name: defaultCurrency
property.label: Default currency code
property.description: ISO 4217 code passed in from the Currency Picker component, e.g. EUR.

property.name: defaultFrequency
property.label: Default frequency
property.description: Frequency pre-selected when the component loads, e.g. oneTime or recurring.

property.name: frequency
property.label: Frequency
property.description: API value of the selected frequency (matches freq1Value or freq2Value).

property.name: amount
property.label: Amount
property.description: Selected or entered amount (supports decimals, e.g. 10.50). Matches cpm:payButton input type.

property.name: amountOneTime
property.label: Amount — one-time
property.description: Amount when frequency is one-time; null otherwise. Prefer Amount.

property.name: amountRecurring
property.label: Amount — recurring
property.description: Amount when frequency is recurring; null otherwise. Prefer Amount.

property.name: selectedCurrency
property.label: Selected currency
property.description: ISO 4217 code of the currency chosen on the form.
